samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state">
            <item value="4'd0">Idle</item>
            <item value="4'd1">Counting</item>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="logic">
            <input_ref id="clk"/>
            <input_ref id="valid_count"/>
            <output_ref id="out"/>
            <state id="state_0" value="'b0000"/>
            <state id="state_1" value="'b0001"/>
            <case>
                <input_ref id="state"/>
                <item>
                    <condition><negation><input_ref id="rst_n"/></negation></condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <output_ref id="out"/> = <state id="state_0"/>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </item>
                <item>
                    <condition><and><input_ref id="valid_count"/><negation><is_equal><output_ref id="out"/><constant id="4"/><sub>1</sub></is_equal></negation></condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <output_ref id="out"/> = <state id="state_0"/>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </item>
                <item>
                    <condition><and><input_ref id="valid_count"/><is_equal><output_ref id="out"/><constant id="4"/><sub>1</sub></is_equal></condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <output_ref id="out"/> = <state id="state_0"/>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </item>
                <item>
                    <condition><and><input_ref id="valid_count"/><negation><is_equal><output_ref id="out"/><constant id="4"/><sub>1</sub></negation></condition>
                    <action>
                        <assign>
                            <output_ref id="out"/> = <output_ref id="out"/> + <constant id="1"/>
                        </assign>
                    </action>
                </item>
            </case>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
</module>
